jobs.title: Meanstack developer
jobs.description:
*Unisys internship hiring for B.Tech (Computer Science) 2027 Batch students.* 

It is to inform you that Unisys internship hiring for B.Tech (Computer Science) 2027 Batch students.

The internship duration will be 9 months to 1 year.

Internship stipend: 35,000 PM

Job Location: Bangalore

Eligibility: Only BE or B. Tech  -  2027 (Computer Science )

Note :  Interns may be considered for full-time positions based on their performance and business requirements.

Intern Job Description:

MEAN Stack Developer (Mongo, Express, Angular, Node)


Role Overview

We are looking for an Advanced Modern UI Developer to design and build high‑performance and scalable user interfaces for next‑generation digital platforms.

The ideal candidate brings strong frontend engineering expertise, hands‑on experience with modern JavaScript frameworks, and a Docker‑first / microservices‑oriented architecture mindset.

 

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain modern, responsive, and accessible web UIs
Build frontend applications using React, Angular, Vue.js, and/or Next.js
Develop UI architectures aligned with microservices and API‑driven backends
Consume REST / GraphQL APIs and integrate with containerized backend services
Implement component‑driven UI design (design systems, reusable components)
Collaborate with UX designers to translate wireframes into high‑quality interfaces
Optimize applications for performance, scalability, and cross‑browser compatibility
Write clean, maintainable, and testable frontend code
Participate in code reviews, technical design discussions, and architecture reviews
Work within CI/CD pipelines and cloud‑native delivery models
Contribute to frontend best practices, standards, and technical direction
 

Required Skills & Experience 

Frontend & UI Technologies

Strong proficiency in JavaScript / TypeScript
Hands‑on experience with one or more: React | Angular | Vue.js | Next.js
Experience with:
HTML5, CSS3, SCSS, Tailwind, or modern CSS frameworks
UI component libraries and design systems
 

Architecture & Engineering

Experience working in a microservices‑based architecture
Strong understanding of API‑first development
Familiarity with Docker‑based development workflows
Experience running frontend apps in containerized environments
Understanding of frontend build tools and bundlers (Webpack, Vite, etc.)
 

What We Look For

Strong innovation mindset with attention to detail
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in cross‑functional teams
Passion for modern frontend technologies and UI innovation
Clear communication and problem‑solving skills
Comfort working in fast‑evolving, research‑driven or innovation‑led environments
 

Please share the top 25 suitable profiles for this job role.
